programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

programme.title: Clear History
programme.desc: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

programme.title: Coastal Elites
programme.desc: Five characters in isolation react with frustration, hilarity and introspection as they grapple with politics, culture, and the pandemic.

programme.desc: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
programme.desc: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tour de Pharmacy
programme.desc: Five competitors provide an inside look at the world of professional cycling and its checkered history with doping.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

programme.desc: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: Devastated by the recent loss of her sister, an increasingly unmoored Sam receives an unexpected lifeline from her co-worker Joel.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: Sam begins to bond with members of choir practice, but her friendship with Joel is threatened over outlooks on their future; after a disappointing review and a concerning visit to her parents' house, Sam seeks help from someone close to Holly.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: Sam and Joel go on a mission to uncover the source of Rick's sudden windfall; choir rehearsals give Sam the courage to share his worries about his mother, Mary Jo, with his father, Ed.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: After Pastor Deb asks for an impromptu meeting, Joel prepares for the worst and promptly breaks out in a vicious neck rash; with money tight, Sam gets creative in sourcing a solution for the upcoming corn harvest and confronts Rick.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: As a tornado touches down, Sam weathers a different kind of storm with Tricia.

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: After receiving shocking news about her job, Sam reevaluates her life.

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: In her quest to inspire Joel, Sam recruits a small team to help and reveals a new potential location for choir practice; on a purple party bus, Sam realizes just how far she's come.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: While he rents out his house, Joel and Sam revel in the highs of their temporary living situation and the lows of cleaning up after strangers; as a newly single Tricia prepares for an empty nest, Sam is overcome with unexpected emotion.

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: At poker night, Fred throws Sam, Joel and Tiffani a curveball; Sam attends a former voice teacher's concert in hopes of becoming her student again with unforeseen consequences; Tricia feels the effects of a small town filled with big talkers.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: As Mary Jo's behavior worsens, Sam and Tricia grapple with the difficult decision to escalate her care; as Tricia pitches her services for Fred and Susan's wedding, Joel has a crisis of faith; Sam struggles to get back in touch with her instrument.

programme.title: Somebody Somewhere
programme.desc: While Sam and Tricia are forced to reveal why they're taking their mother to Wichita, Joel blows his own cover stalking Brad.

programme.desc: While celebrating Tricia's birthday, Sam is blindsided by surprising new information about Holly; as Charity's lies continue to affect Tricia's social life, Joel makes a move with Brad, which leads to a misstep with Sam.

programme.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
programme.desc: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

programme.title: Chris Rock: Bigger & Blacker
programme.desc: Comedian Chris Rock performs in a stand-up special, bringing his sharp unforgiving observations to the Apollo Theater.

programme.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
programme.desc: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

programme.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Rothaniel
programme.desc: Jerrod Carmichael performs before a live audience at the legendary Blue Note Jazz Club in New York City.

programme.title: An Intimate Evening With Adam Pally
programme.desc: Equal parts stand-up, documentary and rock concert, Adam Pally plays with the truth and his guitar in a one-time-only performance.

programme.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
programme.desc: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: While relishing in his new fling, Greg offers Tommy a place to crash; Katie confronts the student behind some personal campus graffiti; Dylan impresses Walt in her new role; Sunny wrestles with a prestigious job offer.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Starter for 10
programme.desc: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.
